entities.name: BANANA

entities.name: CROP YIELD
entities.description: The amount of crop produced per unit area

entities.name: SOIL FERTILITY
entities.description: The ability of soil to sustain plant growth by providing essential nutrients

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The rate of production of the farming system

entities.name: TIME STATIC MODEL
entities.description: A model developed to describe organic resource flows within a farming community

entities.name: FARM SURVEYS
entities.description: Data collection method used to gather visible flow data from farms

entities.name: SEMI-STRUCTURED INTERVIEWS
entities.description: Qualitative data collection method used to gather information from farmers

entities.name: NUTRIENT LOSSES
entities.description: The depletion of essential nutrients from the soil

entities.name: SOIL EROSION
entities.description: The wearing away of topsoil by physical forces

entities.name: SOIL MINING
entities.description: The widespread depletion of soil resources without replenishment

entities.name: UNSUSTAINABLE FARMING SYSTEM
entities.description: A farming system that cannot maintain its productivity over the long term

entities.name: ORGANIC MATERIAL FLOW
entities.description: The movement of organic resources and residues within a farming system

entities.name: ORGANIC MATTER
entities.description: Organic components of the soil

entities.name: NUTRIENT SOURCE
entities.description: The origin of nutrients used for soil replenishment

entities.name: ORGANIC RESOURCES
entities.description: Available organic materials used for soil fertility and mulch

entities.name: CROP RESIDUES
entities.description: Materials left over from annual crops after harvest

entities.name: STOVER
entities.description: The leaves and stalks of a cereal plant after grain harvest

entities.name: MULCH
entities.description: Protective organic layer applied to the soil surface

entities.name: SMALLHOLDER FARMING SYSTEM
entities.description: A farming system managed by small-scale farmers

entities.name: SOUTH WEST UGANDA
entities.description: The geographic region where the study was conducted

entities.name: TROPICS AND SUBTROPICS
entities.description: Broad climatic regions characterized by steeply sloping hillsides

entities.description: Annually cropped areas on steep slopes

entities.description: Areas dedicated to the cultivation of banana crops
